INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Hello, world!'), ('ClickHouse is great!'), ('Sample string for testing'), ('Hello/World'), ('abcdefg');
SELECT position(haystack, 'Hello', 3) FROM (SELECT 'Hello, world!' AS haystack);

SELECT position('abc', '') AS pos_empty_string, position('abc', '', 0) AS pos_zero, position('abc', '', 1) AS pos_start1, position('abc', '', 2) AS pos_start2, position('abc', '', 3) AS pos_start3, position('abc', '', 4) AS pos_start4, position('abc', '', 5) AS pos_start5;
SELECT 5 = position('/' IN s) FROM (SELECT 'Hello/World' AS s);
SELECT position('abcdefg', 'd', 1), position('abcdefg', 'd', 4) FROM (SELECT 'abcdefg' AS haystack);
SELECT position('abc', 'xyz') AS pos_not_found, position('abc', 'a') AS pos_found FROM (SELECT 'abc' AS haystack);
SELECT position(haystack, 'i', 6) FROM (SELECT 'ClickHouse is the best!' AS haystack);
WITH (SELECT 'Hello again, world!' AS haystack) AS subquery SELECT position(haystack, 'again') FROM subquery;
SELECT position(haystack, 't', position(haystack, 's')) FROM test_strings WHERE position(haystack, 's') > 0;
